title: Trump Called Iván Cepeda a ‘Radical Left Marxist.’ Can He Be Colombia’s President?
summary_full: Iván Cepeda was caught off guard by a right-wing outsider and anti-leftist anger. He tells The Times he is not giving up.
summary_public: Iván Cepeda was caught off guard by a right-wing outsider and anti-leftist anger. He tells The Times he is not giving up.
